title: FieldTypeRegistry
description: Declares the metadata for every field in a WorkItem's fields payload for a given workflow type. Central config consumed by: ingestion adapter (type coercion, BigDecimal for MONETARY), routing engine (comparison semantics for GT/LT/GTE/LTE), blotter (default formatting), audit log (field-level data classification). Kept separate from workflow-config because it is consumed by more modules and versioned independently. The idempotencyKey strategy declared here is used by the ingestion adapter to compute WorkItem.idempotencyKey.

workflowType.description: Links this registry to a WorkflowTypeDefinition.

idempotencyKey.description: Defines how the work item's idempotency key is composed. The ingestion adapter uses this to compute WorkItem.idempotencyKey. A PostgreSQL unique index on (tenantId, workflowType, idempotencyKey) enforces deduplication at the database level.

strategy.description: COMPOSITE_HASH: SHA-256 hash of concatenated field values (joined with | separator). EXPLICIT_FIELD: the value of a single field used directly as the key.

fields.description: Required for COMPOSITE_HASH. Ordered array of dot-notation paths whose values are concatenated and hashed.

explicitField.description: Required for EXPLICIT_FIELD. Dot-notation path to the field whose value is used directly as the idempotency key.

hashAlgorithm.description: Hash algorithm for COMPOSITE_HASH. Only SHA-256 is supported; present for future-proofing.

fieldDeclarations.description: Metadata declarations for fields in WorkItem.fields. Named fieldDeclarations (not fields) to avoid ambiguity with the WorkItem.fields payload.

path.description: Dot-notation path into WorkItem.fields (e.g. trade.ref, trade.notionalAmount.amount, counterparty.name). Applies to this path and, for OBJECT type, to all children unless a child overrides.

type.description: MONETARY: inline { amount: string, currency: string } structure. Amount is always string to preserve BigDecimal precision. Drives BigDecimal deserialisation in ingestion and BigDecimal-aware comparison in routing.

required.description: If true and value absent at ingestion, the record is rejected with an error audit entry.

dataClassification.description: Data classification for this field path. Authoritative source — display schemas (blotter, detail-view) cannot override classification. Drives field masking in the blotter and detail view for users without the required role.

searchable.description: If true, a PostgreSQL expression index is created via Liquibase for this path. Required for blotter filter columns referencing this path — validateConfigs enforces that all filterable blotter columns have searchable:true declared here.

pgIndexType.description: Hint for Liquibase migration generation. Defaults: STRING -> BTREE, MONETARY -> BTREE_CAST_NUMERIC (casts amount string to numeric for range queries), OBJECT -> GIN.

formatter.description: Default display format hint consumed by blotter and detail view. Display configs override this only when a different format is needed for a specific context.

defaultValue.description: Used when value absent and required:false. Type must match the declared field type.
